pages.text: $(o)"One who walks toward the void has no return path — but does have a path."$()$(br2)$(#660099)Abysswalkers$() are seen as outsiders by other schools — they ally with the most dangerous thread of Transcendence: $(l)Void$().

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Abysswalker$()'s three contemplations:$(br2)1. $(l)Existence is temporary; non-existence is eternal$()$(br)2. $(l)What is excised is not always destroyed$()$(br)3. $(l)True power is not having to act$()$(br2)Primary element: $(l)Void$(); minor affinities: $(l)Dark$(), $(l)Space$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Origin disputed: some say they inherited fragments of the ancient Void Warden's mind; others, that they descend from the first mage to wield the Void Exile Mandate.$(br2)They appear rarely. Each appearance triggers panic — Abysswalkers can make targets "never have existed".
